sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53646" key="ka/t" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάτ</orth>, for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κατά</foreign> before <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τ</itype>, <sense id="n53646.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καττά</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
